offline_notice: This file contains only works supplied by this repository as local EPUB/PDF editions. It has no runtime dependency on external catalogs or URLs.

collection_policy.practical_preparedness: Legacy preparedness and practical-library memberships are merged into practical-preparedness.
collection_policy.original_language: Membership requires a stored non-English edition whose language matches the work's declared original language; an English translation alone does not qualify.

collections.name: Banned & Challenged Literature
collections.description: Literature with a documented history of suppression, prohibition, removal, or challenge.

collections.name: Essential Literature
collections.description: High-impact works selected for literary and historical importance.

collections.name: Suppressed Knowledge
collections.description: Material likely to be restricted or controlled by an authoritarian regime because it supports independent thought, private communication, resistance to coercion, critique of authority, media literacy, or preservation of disfavored history.

collections.name: Practical Skills & Preparedness
collections.description: Locally stored references for emergency readiness, fieldcraft, first aid, sanitation, navigation, communications, household work, repair, construction, agriculture, food preservation, and other practical continuity skills.

collections.name: Original-Language Editions
collections.description: Non-English works for which this archive actually stores an edition in the work's original language. An English translation by itself does not qualify a work for this collection.

collections.name: Open-Distribution Library
collections.description: Copyrighted works included under an explicit redistribution license or permission.

collections.name: Essential Reading
collections.description: A thematic reading list. A work may also be locally included under a compatible distribution basis.

records.description: Families experience love, war, social upheaval, and historical change during the Napoleonic invasion of Russia.
records.why_included: A perennial top-ranked novel with political, religious, pacifist, and historical significance.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The original work and any English translation are separate editions; jurisdiction and translator details matter.
rights_guidance.operator_question: May I download, keep, share, or publish this specific edition where and how I intend to use it?

records.title: We
records.author: Yevgeny Zamyatin
records.description: A mathematician in a totalitarian glass city develops imagination, desire, and rebellion.
records.why_included: Banned in the Soviet Union and foundational to dystopian fiction.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The original work and any English translation are separate editions; jurisdiction and translator details matter.
rights_guidance.operator_question: May I download, keep, share, or publish this specific edition where and how I intend to use it?

records.title: What Is Property?
records.author: Pierre-Joseph Proudhon
records.description: A critique of conventional property rights and their relationship to power.
records.why_included: Politically controversial challenge to ownership, hierarchy, and the state.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The original work and any English translation are separate editions; jurisdiction and translator details matter.
rights_guidance.operator_question: May I download, keep, share, or publish this specific edition where and how I intend to use it?

records.title: Winesburg, Ohio
records.author: Sherwood Anderson
records.description: Interconnected stories about isolation and frustrated lives in a small town.
records.why_included: Removed from libraries for sexual themes and alleged obscenity.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The underlying English-language work predates the current U.S. public-domain cutoff, but later additions in a specific file can differ.
rights_guidance.operator_question: May I download, keep, share, or publish this specific edition where and how I intend to use it?

records.title: Women in Love
records.author: D. H. Lawrence
records.description: Two sisters confront love, class, industrial society, desire, and emotional power.
records.why_included: Prosecuted and restricted for sexuality and alleged obscenity.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The underlying English-language work predates the current U.S. public-domain cutoff, but later additions in a specific file can differ.
rights_guidance.operator_question: May I download, keep, share, or publish this specific edition where and how I intend to use it?

records.title: Woodcraft and Camping
records.author: George Washington Sears
records.description: Lightweight camping, shelter, cooking, and canoe travel.
records.why_included: Foundational fieldcraft reference with durable practical insight.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The underlying English-language work predates the current U.S. public-domain cutoff, but later additions in a specific file can differ.

records.title: Wuthering Heights
records.author: Emily Brontë
records.description: Obsession and revenge shape two generations on the Yorkshire moors.
records.why_included: Condemned and challenged for cruelty, abuse, violence, class conflict, and religious irreverence.

evidence_notes: The source for the included edition is recorded with this archive; inspect that source's own rights statement before use.
The underlying English-language work predates the current U.S. public-domain cutoff, but later additions in a specific file can differ.
